prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `cfb2ce5a`.
codex_response:
The rule is: take the dense `4x4` two-color template in the upper-left interior, mirror it into the other three interior quadrants with `vmirror`, `hmirror`, and `rot180`, and recolor each mirrored copy from the sparse clue cells already present in that quadrant; if one template color is unclued there, it resolves to background `0`.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis and kept it after checking it against all official examples; no correction note was needed. No new primitive was added.

- Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cfb2ce5a/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cfb2ce5a/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cfb2ce5a/generator.py#L1)
